senses.definition: the things we wear to cover our body, such as pants, shirts, and jackets

examples.x: He always wears comfortable clothes when he goes for a run.
I need to wash my clothes before I can wear them again.
My mother asked me to fold my clothes and organize them in my closet.
She received many compliments on her stylish clothes.
She was excited to buy new clothes for the summer season.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing usually worn by men on the upper half of the body, typically with a collar and sleeves, and with buttons down the front

examples.x: I need to iron my shirt before wearing it.
I prefer wearing long-sleeved shirts in the winter.
The shirt has a pocket on the chest for small items.
The shirt I recently bought is made of soft cotton fabric.
The shirt was too small for me, so I exchanged it for a larger size.

senses.definition: a casual short-sleeved shirt with no collar, usually made of cotton

examples.x: I spilled ketchup on my T-shirt while eating lunch.
I'm going to iron my T-shirt to make it look neat and wrinkle-free.
My dad gave me his old T-shirt, and now it's my favorite.
She always wears a plain white T-shirt with jeans.
She folded her T-shirt and put it neatly in the drawer.

senses.definition: an item of clothing that covers the lower half of our body, from our waist to our ankles, and covers each leg separately

examples.x: He is going to wear black pants and a white shirt for his job interview.
He rolled up the cuffs of his pants for a more casual look.
My brother always wears a belt with his pants to keep them from falling down.
She prefers to wear loose-fitting pants for maximum comfort.
The pants are too tight around the waist, so I can't zip them up.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing worn by girls and women that is made in one piece and covers the body down to the legs but has no separate part for each leg

examples.x: He asked her wife to wear a formal dress to the event.
I need you to help me find a dress that matches my new shoes.
I want to buy a new dress for the wedding.
My mom helped me zip up the back of my dress.
She tried on several dresses before finding the perfect one.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing for girls or women that fastens around the waist and hangs down around the legs

examples.x: I love twirling in my favorite skirt.
She chose a knee-length skirt for the office.
She paired her skirt with a white blouse and heels.
The skirt has a zipper at the back for easy wearing.
This skirt has a stretchy waistband for comfort.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing with long sleeves, worn outdoors and over other clothes to keep warm or dry

examples.x: He buttoned up his coat to keep out the chilly wind.
I need to buy a new coat for the upcoming season.
I think that I need to take my coat off before sitting down.
My little daughter wears a fluffy coat that makes her look like a teddy bear.
She wrapped her coat tightly around herself to stay warm.

senses.definition: a short item of clothing that we wear on the top part of our body, usually has sleeves and something in the front so we could close it

examples.x: He unzipped his jacket when he entered the warm building.
She wore a puffy jacket that kept her warm in the snow.
The jacket has multiple pockets, perfect for storing small items.
The jacket is made of waterproof material, so it's great for rainy days.

senses.definition: pants made of denim, that is a type of strong cotton cloth, and is used for a casual style

examples.x: He bought a new pair of jeans that fit him perfectly.
He patched up the holes in his old jeans to make them last longer.
He prefers high-waisted jeans for a retro style.
My mother washed my jeans to keep them clean and fresh.
The jeans I own are blue and have a straight leg cut.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing worn on the top part of our body that is made of cotton or wool, has long sleeves and a closed front

examples.x: He bought a new sweater with a colorful pattern for me.
He prefers crewneck sweaters for a versatile and easy-to-wear option.
I like the comfort of wearing a cashmere sweater against my skin.
I need a lightweight sweater for the spring season.
The sweater I have is made of soft wool and has long sleeves.

senses.definition: a jacket with a pair of pants or a skirt that are made from the same cloth and should be worn together

examples.x: He paired his suit with polished dress shoes.
My dad bought a stylish suit for his friend's wedding.
She felt ready for the business presentation in her well-fitted suit.
She needs to iron her suit before the important meeting.
The suit he wore was tailored to fit him perfectly.

senses.definition: a long and narrow piece of fabric tied around the collar, particularly worn by men

examples.x: He adjusted his tie in the mirror to make sure it was straight.
He used to wear a silk tie with his formal suit.
He wore a tie to the wedding for a unique look.
She finally loosened her tie after a long day at work.
She helped her father pick out a matching tie for his business meeting.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing often with a brim that we wear on our heads, for warmth, as a fashion item or as part of a uniform

examples.x: My father always places his hat on the hook by the door before entering the house.
She bought a new hat to add a stylish accessory to her outfit.
She tried on different hats at the store to find the perfect fit.
She used to wear a wide-brimmed hat to protect her face from the sun.

senses.definition: a small bag that is used, particularly by women, to carry personal items

examples.x: He found a purse on the street and returned it to its owner.
MY wife opened her purse and pulled out a pen to write a note.
She always carries a small purse to hold her keys and wallet.
She placed her purse on the chair next to her at the restaurant.
She used to keep her phone in her purse.

senses.definition: something that we wear to cover and protect our feet, generally made of strong materials like leather or plastic

examples.x: He polished his leather shoes to make them look shiny.
He tied his shoelaces tightly to make sure his shoes wouldn't come off.
I bought my little son's first pair of shoes to help him learn to walk.
She picked up her baby's shoes and put them on before going outside.

senses.definition: a type of strong shoe that covers the foot and ankle and often the lower part of the leg

examples.x: I love the sound of my boots clicking on the wooden floor.
I put on my boots to go for a walk in the snowy park.
She left her muddy boots at the entrance and put on slippers.
The fashionable boots added a trendy touch to her outfit.
The rain soaked through her boots, making her feet wet.

senses.definition: a soft item of clothing we wear on our feet

examples.x: He wore thick woolen socks to keep his feet cozy in the snow.
I put on a clean pair of socks every morning.
She found a sock under the bed that had been missing for weeks.
She lost one of her socks in the laundry and couldn't find it.
The striped socks matched perfectly with his striped shirt.

senses.definition: a loose jacket or shirt and pants worn in bed

examples.x: He forgot to change out of his pajamas before going to the store.
I always pack my favorite pajamas when I go on vacation.
I like to wear comfortable pajamas when I sleep.
She received a new pair of pajamas as a gift for her birthday.

senses.definition: clothes that we wear under all the other pieces of clothing right on top of our skin

examples.x: He accidentally put his underwear on inside out.
He bought a pack of plain white underwear for everyday wear.
I need to buy new underwear because my old ones are worn out.
I prefer to wear comfortable cotton underwear.
The store sells a variety of underwear styles, including briefs and boxers.

senses.definition: a piece of clothing worn for swimming, especially by women and girls

examples.x: He enjoys wearing his swimsuit at the water park on hot summer days.
He forgot to pack his swimsuit and had to borrow one from his friend.
She felt confident and beautiful in her new swimsuit.
She put on her swimsuit and jumped into the pool.
She wore her swimsuit to the beach and enjoyed swimming in the ocean.
